# Left PEQ filters
# miniDSP-style peaking filters plus normalized biquad coefficients
# Biquad convention: y[n] = b0*x[n] + b1*x[n-1] + b2*x[n-2] - a1*y[n-1] - a2*y[n-2]

Filter 1: ON PK Fc 229.248 Hz Gain +3.000 dB Q 1.5104
  biquad b0=1.00171687608 b1=-1.99145232344 b2=0.989959633845 a1=-1.99145232344 a2=0.991676509924
Filter 2: ON PK Fc 109.131 Hz Gain +3.000 dB Q 1.3707
  biquad b0=1.0009023791 b1=-1.99557432183 b2=0.994722847665 a1=-1.99557432183 a2=0.995625226769

  biquad b0=1.01363976707 b1=-1.92171476194 b2=0.920234047556 a1=-1.92171476194 a2=0.93387381463

  biquad b0=1.00014523861 b1=-1.99927492643 b2=0.999150638248 a1=-1.99927492643 a2=0.999295876863

  biquad b0=1.00124348358 b1=-1.99299318782 b2=0.992178120377 a1=-1.99299318782 a2=0.993421603957
